# llms.txt for PixPoc

website: https://pixpoc.ai
name: PixPoc
description: PixPoc provides ultra-realistic AI phone agents designed for enterprise support, sales, and operations. Our agents operate 24/7, speak 30+ languages, and integrate seamlessly with your existing CRM and business tools.

## Core Offerings
- **Hyper-Realistic AI Agents**: Indistinguishable from humans, capable of complex reasoning and context retention.
- **Global & Local**: Native support for 100+ languages including detailed regional accents (English, Hindi, Spanish, etc.).
- **Omnichannel**: Deploy on Phone (PSTN/SIP), Web, and integrate with SMS/Chat.
- **Enterprise Grade**: ISO/SOC2 compliant security, high concurrency, and <300ms latency.

## Pricing: Pay As You Go
Simple, transparent pricing. No fixed monthly platform fees for the standard plan.

### Base Rates
- **India**: ₹3 / minute
- **Global**: $0.05 / minute

### Included Features
- Unlimited Agents & Concurrent Calls
- Unlimited Campaigns
- Bring Your Own Carrier (BYOC) - Twilio / KooKoo
- Full API Access & Integrations
- Real-time Analytics & Call Recording
- **Contact Memory**: Agents recall past conversations.
- **Knowledge Base**: RAG-powered answers from your docs.

### Expansion Modules (Add-ons)
- **Channel Expansion**: ₹800/mo (IN) / $15/mo (Global) - For PixPoc provided numbers.
- **Additional Mobile Number**: ₹600/mo (IN) / $10/mo (Global).
- **Volume Discounts**: Available for >10k mins/month.

## Key Features & Capabilities
- **Contact Memory**: Agents remember context across calls for personalized experiences.
- **Knowledge Base**: Connect documents/FAQs for instant, accurate answers.
- **Call Analysis**: Real-time sentiment analysis, extraction of key metrics, and automated tagging.
- **Custom API Triggers**: Fetch data or trigger workflows (e.g., "Check Order Status") mid-call.
- **MCP Integration**: Extend agent capabilities via Model Context Protocol.
- **Human-Like Behavior**: Handles interruptions, varying speaking rates, and filler words naturally.

## Use Cases
- **Customer Support**: 24/7 FAQ handling, ticket creation, and triage.
- **Sales & Leads**: Lead qualification, outbound sales, and follow-ups.
- **Operations**: Appointment scheduling, COD confirmation (Ecommerce), and reminders.
- **Recruitment**: Candidate screening and interview scheduling.
- **Healthcare**: Patient appointment booking and front-desk automation.

## Integrations
Seamlessly connects with your stack:
- **CRM**: Salesforce, HubSpot, Zoho, Pipedrive, Dynamics 365.
- **Calendar**: Google Calendar, Calendly.
- **Support**: Zendesk, Freshdesk, Intercom.
- **Productivity**: Google Sheets, Notion, Slack.
- **Communication**: WATI (WhatsApp), Twilio.

## Key Links
- **Home**: https://pixpoc.ai
- **Pricing**: https://pixpoc.ai/pricing
- **Contact**: https://pixpoc.ai/contact
- **Login**: https://app.pixpoc.ai

- **Email**: founders@pixpoc.ai
